name: my-skills
description: Stage-scoped plugins for agentic .NET development, managed through GitHub: workflow-core (ops/meta + repo/backlog setup + pipeline orchestrators), system-definition (research/spec/plan -> issue backlog), architecture (ARCH/C4/ADRs + .NET/Azure scaffolding from the backlog), and development (Aspire/EF Core/Agent Framework references + issue-driven build/verify). Enable per stage to keep skill context minimal.
